name: InReach NC
quote: Living support was provided to 84 individuals in our 24/7 staffed group homes, and 235 individuals were provided with job support to secure employment and complete training.
description: InReach is a recognized leader in providing housing, employment, and community support for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities in Charlotte/Mecklenburg and nearby counties.
address: 4014 Monroe Rd, Building 4 Suite 170, Charlotte, NC 28205

name: Down Syndrome Association of Greater Charlotte
quote: Don't look away because you're uncomfortable. Comfort starts here.
description: A family-support nonprofit helping individuals with Down syndrome reach their full potential and become respected members of their community.
address: 3900 Park Road, Suite C, Charlotte, NC 28209

name: Nevins Inc.
quote: Providing exceptional person-centered care to adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities since 1959.
description: Nevins supports individuals in Mecklenburg County with developmental disabilities including intellectual development disorder, epilepsy, cerebral palsy, traumatic brain injury, autism, and learning disabilities.

name: LIFESPAN Services
quote: We illuminate the abilities of children and adults with disabilities through education, employment, and enrichment.
description: LIFESPAN provides education, employment, and enrichment opportunities so people of all ages and abilities can live, work, and play in their communities throughout their lives.
address: 1511 Shopton Road, Suite A, Charlotte, NC 28217

name: Healthy Charlotte Alliance
quote: Our mission is to improve the health and quality of life for all people of Mecklenburg County.
description: Founded by physicians, Healthy Charlotte Alliance advances health through education, volunteer engagement, and investment in proven-effective health programs.
address: 338 S Sharon Amity Road, #504, Charlotte, NC 28211

name: RAIN
quote: RAIN empowers people living with HIV and those at risk to be healthy and stigma free.
description: RAIN helps clients access medical care and medications, offers emergency help with rent, utilities, and food, and supports people facing challenges that affect their health and stability.

name: Hospitality House of Charlotte
quote: A safe, comfortable place to stay so families can focus on healing rather than housing.
description: Provides affordable housing and a supportive community for patients and families who must travel to Charlotte for critical medical care.

name: NAMI Charlotte
quote: A free seminar for people who have loved ones with a mental health condition, and a chance to meet others in similar situations.
description: NAMI Family & Friends is a free seminar that teaches people how to best support loved ones living with a mental health condition, with community and resources included.

name: Freedom School Partners
quote: We inspire scholars to love reading and learning, believe in themselves, and create extraordinary futures.
description: A Charlotte-area nonprofit focused on educational equity and closing academic achievement gaps for local scholars.

name: Learning Help Centers of Charlotte
quote: Scholastic, spiritual, and social support to equip and empower our underserved neighbors.
description: LHCC offers weekly tutoring for students, skill-building for parents, summer camps, and family events that promote connection and well-being.

name: Augustine Literacy Project
quote: The best tutoring program I have experienced in 20 years of teaching.
description: Provides free, long-term, one-on-one literacy tutoring to K-2 readers in Charlotte-Mecklenburg Title I schools using trained volunteers and research-based instruction.

name: Urban League of Central Carolinas
quote: We equip African Americans and all underserved communities with the tools to achieve social and economic equality.
description: Provides workforce development, education, housing support, health access, and advocacy programs that drive economic mobility and long-term stability.

name: Mayor's Youth Employment Program
quote: Every young person deserves the support and opportunities they need to succeed today and build a brighter future.
description: Provides paid work experiences that help high-school-aged teens develop career goals, stay in school, achieve academically, and build skills for work and life.

name: Charlotte Works
quote: Connecting job seekers to meaningful employment and fostering inclusive economic growth.
description: Connects job seekers and employers, provides training, and aligns workforce initiatives to support Charlotte's economic growth.

name: NCWorks
quote: A statewide system uniting job seekers, employers, and training programs.
description: North Carolina's statewide workforce system helps residents find jobs, build skills, and access career services while supporting employers with hiring and training.

name: MeckWorks
quote: Connecting job seekers to local businesses that are hiring right now.
description: Helps Mecklenburg County residents facing significant life barriers gain rapid employment, stability, and long-term economic mobility through integrated support and job placement.

name: TreesCharlotte
quote: A community with a shared responsibility for trees.
description: A nonprofit that partners with the community to plant and care for trees and grow a healthier tree canopy for everyone. Volunteer or donate to help.
address: 4404 Stuart Andrew Blvd, Suite M, Charlotte, NC 28217

name: Sustain Charlotte
quote: We work to address the region's most pressing challenges.
description: Addresses carbon emissions, environmental conservation, and sustainable transportation across the Charlotte region. Volunteers welcome.

name: CleanAIRE NC
quote: Action and Innovation to Restore the Environment.
description: Works so everyone in North Carolina has clean air and a healthy environment through education, climate policy, and community solutions.

name: Catawba Riverkeeper
quote: We preserve and protect the vital waters of the Catawba.
description: Scientists, activists, and enthusiasts advocating for the Catawba River, which flows through the Charlotte metro and provides water to two million residents.

name: Storm Water Services
quote: Keeping neighborhoods safe and protecting local waterways.
description: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Storm Water Services maintains storm drains, creeks, and flood-prone areas, fixes drainage problems, and helps prevent flooding and pollution.

name: Safe Alliance
quote: We provide hope and healing to those impacted by domestic violence, sexual assault, and human trafficking.
description: Offers a 24/7 crisis hotline, emergency shelter, counseling, legal support, and programs that help survivors stay safe and rebuild their lives.

name: Benevolent Bridges
quote: Creating sustainable impact, fostering hope and connection within the community.
description: Provides assistance to people experiencing homelessness through a comprehensive approach to restoring dignity, promoting health, and building community connection.

name: Crisis Assistance Ministry
quote: Help, hope, and understanding for people struggling with limited financial resources.
description: Provides emergency rent assistance, free essential items, and long-term financial coaching to help people move toward self-sufficiency.

name: Second Harvest Food Bank of Metrolina
quote: Together we can end hunger.
description: Provides quality food and grocery items to people in need across Charlotte and surrounding counties.

name: Habitat Charlotte Region
quote: Affordable homeownership and a path to housing stability.
description: Connects residents with programs that support housing stability, financial wellness, and basic needs beyond Habitat's own services.

name: Hope Haven Inc.
quote: The best way to predict your future is to create it.
description: A community that provides recovery for individuals and families impacted by substance use disorder so they can build healthy, independent lives.

name: Hearts & Hands Food Pantry
quote: Simply the kindest people, so professionally run.
description: Provides shelf-stable and perishable groceries, personal care products, baby needs including diapers and formula, and pet supplies.

name: Families Forward Charlotte
quote: We help local families take the necessary steps toward long-term financial stability.
description: Matches each struggling family with a trained volunteer who supports them for one to two years with guidance, encouragement, and practical help.

name: Ballantyne Families Helping Neighbors in Need
quote: Because of generous support, I was able to provide for my boys as a single mom.
description: Provides food assistance to struggling families connected to Ballantyne-area public schools through seasonal giving events and a food pantry.

name: Smart Start of Mecklenburg
quote: The Imagination Library has really helped grow my son's love of reading.
description: Helps young children get the best possible start through support for families, childcare providers, and early-learning programs like the Dolly Parton Imagination Library.

name: Thompson
quote: By 2030 we will serve 8,000 children and families each year.
description: Dedicated to transforming lives through prevention, mental health, and foster care so every child can heal, grow, and thrive.
